2605.25984.title: SafeCtrl-RL: Inference-Time Adaptive Behaviour Control for LLM Dialogue via RL-Driven Prompt Optimisation
2605.25984.paper_summary: Ensuring safe and contextually appropriate behaviour in Large Language Models (LLMs) remains a critical challenge for real-world deployment. We present \textbf{SafeCtrl-RL}, an inference-time behavioural control framework that enables adaptive safety regulation without model retraining or parameter modification. The method formulates dialogue generation as a sequential decision process, where a reinforcement learning agent dynamically selects prompt adjustment strategies based on contextual feedback. This allows unsafe behaviours to be suppressed through iterative refinement, which we conceptualise as inference-time behavioural unlearning. Evaluated across multiple LLMs and unsafe dialogue scenarios, SafeCtrl-RL consistently improves safety and response quality, outperforms existing prompt-based optimisation methods, and achieves favourable performance--efficiency trade-offs. **Warning: This paper may contain examples of harmful language, and reader discretion is recommended.
2605.25984.paper_summary_zh: 確保大型語言模型（LLMs）在安全和上下文適當的行為方面仍然是實際應用中的一個關鍵挑戰。<lb/>我們提出了\textbf{SafeCtrl-RL}，這是一個推理時的行為控制框架，能夠在不重新訓練模型或修改參數的情況下實現自適應安全調節。<lb/>該方法將對話生成公式化為一個序列決策過程，其中強化學習代理根據上下文反饋動態選擇提示調整策略。<lb/>這使得不安全的行為能夠通過迭代精煉來抑制，我們將其概念化為推理時的行為遺忘。<lb/>在多個LLMs和不安全對話場景中進行評估，SafeCtrl-RL持續提高安全性和反應質量，超越現有的基於提示的優化方法，並實現有利的性能-效率權衡。<lb/>**警告：本文可能包含有害語言的例子，建議讀者自行斟酌。
2605.25984.author: Michael Orme et.al.
2605.25984.authors: Michael Orme, Yanchao Yu, Zhiyuan Tan
